features.name: signed right shift with type width mismatch
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic right shift (>>>) where the left operand and shift amount have different bit widths due to type inference

features.name: concatenation with replication in shift operand
features.description: Code should include a concatenation with replication used as an operand to a shift operation

features.name: nested signed right shifts with comparison result
features.description: Code should include nested signed right shift operations where the inner shift result feeds the outer shift, with a comparison result as the outer shift amount
